creator: roelof@eboa.com
text:
Clearly those sites did not carry the requested archive. Samba.org 
seems only to carry the latest tarball (currently 2.03). I found
the archive on the UK mirror of FreeBSD. Since this site is more
complete and earlier updated than the dutch mirror I would suggest
adding that to the list.

Fix: 

See description.
How-To-Repeat: 
	

cd /usr/ports/net/samba
make install
